Motion And Notice To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Heather Gibson, Esq. 408-250-3502 for Plaintiff.
Matthew Yan, Esq., Deputy city Attorney, 415-554-3845 for Defendant City and County of San Francisco. (In-person)

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Yan argues privilege log and CCP 2031.280 (documents produced). Ms. Gibson responds and argues CCP 2031.280 in conjunction with CCP 2031.240(c)(1). The Court shares its views. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentatvie ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN SANCHEZ'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production, Set One.

Plaintiff's motion to compel document production is granted in part and denied in part as articulated in the judge pro tem's report and recommendation, which is adopted.

Mr. Yan to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and approved as to form by Ms. Gibson. Proposed order to include the point he has raised at the hearing regarding CCP 2031.280.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
